subcodes.first_line: O servant of the One True God! These are the days of testing, and the hosts of doubt are spreading, while the whirlwind of confusion is raging [3.5s]

subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @firmness in the Covenant, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @predictions and prophecies
